# 🤝 Contributing

Please follow these steps:

1. Open a feature request and get green light from the project maintainers to work on that or pick an opened issue
2. Fork the repository
3. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`
4. Commit your changes following
   [conventional Commit Messages guidance](https://gist.github.com/qoomon/5dfcdf8eec66a051ecd85625518cfd13)
5. Open a Pull Request
6. Make sure to pass PR pipelines
7. While reviewing process, please follow
   [conventional review comments style](https://conventionalcomments.org/)
